## What does this PR add or change?

<!-- Brief description of the content added or changed. Be specific. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `mkdocs serve` locally and the page renders correctly with no console errors
- [ ] I ran `mkdocs build --strict` and it completed with zero warnings or errors
- [ ] My page(s) have correct frontmatter: `title`, `description`, and `tags`
- [ ] I added my page to the `nav:` section of `mkdocs.yml`
- [ ] All external links I added are live and go to the correct destinations
- [ ] I followed the [Style Guide](docs/contributing/style-guide.md)
- [ ] I used a [template](docs/contributing/templates/) as my starting point

## Type of change

- [ ] New tutorial
- [ ] New or updated project documentation
- [ ] New resource page
- [ ] Fix (typo, broken link, formatting, factual correction)
- [ ] Site configuration or structural change
- [ ] Other (describe above)
